mapper.insert:
insert into study_java_order_item (order_id, goods_id, goods_name, goods_cover_img, selling_price, goods_count, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values
(#{item.orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.goodsCoverImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sellingPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.goodsCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
